steps.title: Compare the emissivity values
steps.content: The task asks for a contrast between reflective metal fibers and silicon carbide fibers. The notes provide the key comparison: reflective metal fibers had very low emissivity, while silicon carbide fibers had much higher emissivity.

steps.title: Reject weak comparisons
steps.content: Choice A names emissivity without contrasting the values. Choice B states a general rule instead of comparing the fibers. Choice C mentions different rates but shifts attention to the garment. The sentence with both values makes the contrast clear. The answer is D.
